task_completion.description: Verify the Strategy Analyzer is open and configured with the correct strategy and instrument.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Strategy Analyzer window is visible. In the settings/parameters pane, the Strategy dropdown is set to 'SampleMACrossover' and the Instrument is set to 'SPY'.

task_completion.description: Verify the backtest timeframe is set to cover January 2023 to December 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Strategy Analyzer settings, the Start Date is set to a date in January 2023 and the End Date is set to a date in December 2024.

task_completion.description: Verify the backtest has been executed and the Annual performance breakdown is displayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main display area of the Strategy Analyzer shows a performance grid or report. The view is set to 'Annual' (or similar yearly breakdown), and rows/columns for the years '2023' and '2024' are visible with populated performance metrics (e.g., Net Profit).

task_completion.description: Verify the annual performance report is exported to the specified CSV file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog box showing the file name 'annual_report.csv' being saved in the 'Documents' folder (C:\Users\Docker\Documents), or a file explorer/editor showing the successfully saved file at that exact path.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the trading platform's GUI to run the backtest.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the NinjaTrader/Strategy Analyzer interface (clicking run, configuring dropdowns) rather than a terminal window or script generating a fake CSV.

integrity.description: Verify the CSV was generated via the application's export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of the application's native export/save dialog or context menu (e.g., right-clicking the grid and selecting 'Export') rather than manually typing the data into a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just copy-paste expected strings into a file.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the contents of 'annual_report.csv' are visible, they should look like a genuine structured CSV export from the platform containing full backtest metrics, not just the isolated strings '2023', '2024', and 'Net Profit'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Instrument: 'SPY'. Target Strategy: 'SampleMACrossover'. Required Timeframe: Jan 2023 to Dec 2024. Expected Output Path: 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\annual_report.csv'. The exported file must contain the strings '2023', '2024', and 'Net Profit'.
